title: rebuttal_points.json -- structured rebuttal arguments v0.1
description: Produced by denial-validation's checkpoint 2 (Rebuttal point generation). One entry per denial reason where denial_validation_result.json found not_supported or partially_supported -- reasons the insurer's position held up are not included. Read downstream by draft-report's v2 checkpoint. rebuttal_points.md (the narrative) is assembled from this via tools/document_assembly.py; this file is the structured content, not a lean pointer to it.

reason_id.description: References denial_reason_result.json's reason_id -- the denial reason this rebuts.

verdict.description: The denial_validation_result.json verdict that made this rebuttal point exist.

rebuttal_argument.description: The argument itself. Hedged per P3 -- use the forbidden-expression substitutions from pipeline.md (e.g. "분쟁 대응 여지가 있다" rather than an outright win claim).
